posts.text:
New coalition of the willing


Republicans against Trump (@RpsAgainstTrump)

🚨BREAKING: The Trump administration plans to announce that multiple countries have agreed to form a coalition to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz—WSJ





— https://nitter.net/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2033288887548727296#m

It’s such a dominant victory that in this same interview Waltz begged other countries to come rescue us from our own mess in the Strait of Hormuz.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

UN Ambassador Mike Waltz: "This has been a dominant victory the likes of which we haven't seen in modern American military history"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033168375564669109#m

Tucker’s efforts to pin sole blame for the Iran war catastrophe on Israel is such a transparent ruse to wash the blood off the hands of the man he worked 3 times to put in office and by proxy avoid culpability for his own role in this disaster.


Brandon Weichert (@WeTheBrandon)

The US has made a grievous error in attacking Iran. Our strategy does not match the necessary ends, ways, and means...and our objectives are totally out of alignment with the force we've assembled. I explained the probl

Comments here are filled with people demanding news agencies lie to them and say Trump’s glorious war is going spectacularly. Depressing


ABC News Politics (@ABCPolitics)

Even as Iran has been "pummeled" by Israeli and American air strikes, with its military capabilities greatly diminished, Tehran continues to demonstrate resolve, both in adapting and expanding its military tactics, observers told ABC News. abcnews.link/at81GGu




— https://nitter.net/ABCPolitics/status/2032213966663844279#m
